# 结构化数据索引

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate-artifact-index.py. Do not edit manually. -->

本页由 `data/artifacts/*.yml` 生成，用于维护和审阅结构化 artifact 数据。主要阅读入口是 [注册表位置](../registry-tree/index.md) 和 [取证场景](../questions/index.md)，人工维护的补充索引见 [Artifact 补充索引](index.md)。

| Artifact | 分类 | 原生根键 | Hive / 离线文件 | 证据类型 | 取证价值 | 检测价值 | 主要路径 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Active Setup](persistence/active-setup.md) | 持久化, 自启动 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE / HKEY_CURRENT_USER` | `SOFTWARE`, `NTUSER.DAT`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE`, `C:\Users\<user>\NTUSER.DAT` | User logon initialization configuration | 高 | 高 | `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components`<br>`HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components` |
| [Amcache](execution/amcache.md) | 程序执行, 程序元数据 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `Amcache.hve`<br>`C:\Windows\AppCompat\Programs\Amcache.hve` | Program presence, File metadata | 高 | 中 | `Amcache.hve\Root\File`<br>`Amcache.hve\Root\InventoryApplicationFile` |
| [AppInit_DLLs](persistence/appinit-dlls.md) | 持久化, 劫持 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SOFTWARE`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE` | User32 DLL load configuration | 高 | 高 | `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows /v AppInit_DLLs`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows /v AppInit_DLLs` |
| [Audit Policy](security/audit-policy.md) | 安全策略, 审计策略 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SECURITY`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SECURITY` | Audit visibility configuration | 高 | 高 | `HKLM\SECURITY\Policy\PolAdtEv` |
| [BAM / DAM](execution/bam-dam.md) | 程序执行, 程序存在 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SYSTEM`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SYSTEM` | Execution indicator, User SID attribution | 高 | 中 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\bam\State\UserSettings\<SID> /v <executable NT device path>`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\bam\State\UserSettings\<SID> /v <executable NT device path>` |
| [Command Processor\AutoRun](persistence/command-processor-autorun.md) | 持久化, 自启动 | `HKEY_CURRENT_USER` | `NTUSER.DAT`, `SOFTWARE`<br>`C:\Users\<user>\NTUSER.DAT`, `C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE` | Command shell autorun | 高 | 高 | `HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Command Processor /v AutoRun`<br>`HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Command Processor /v AutoRun` |
| [CredSSP / NLA](rdp/credssp-nla.md) | RDP, 远程访问, 安全策略 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SYSTEM`, `SOFTWARE`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SYSTEM`, `C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE` | RDP authentication security configuration | 中 | 高 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp /v UserAuthentication`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp /v SecurityLayer`<br>... |
| [Defender Policies](security/defender-policies.md) | 安全策略, Defender | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SOFTWARE`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE` | Security control configuration | 高 | 高 | `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Exclusions\Paths` |
| [DeviceClasses](usb/deviceclasses.md) | USB, 设备 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SYSTEM`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SYSTEM` | Device interface class registration | 中 | 低 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\DeviceClasses`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Control\DeviceClasses` |
| [Drivers](persistence/drivers.md) | 持久化, 服务 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SYSTEM`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SYSTEM` | Kernel or file system driver configuration | 高 | 高 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\<DriverName>`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\<DriverName>` |
| [EMDMgmt](usb/emdmgmt.md) | USB, 卷 / 盘符 | `HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE` | `SOFTWARE`<br>`C:\Windows\System32\Config\SOFTWARE` | ReadyBoost or external memory device metadata | 中 | 低 | `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\EMDMgmt` |
